name: Identity Federation Abuse Response
description: Detects abuse of identity federation (SAML, OIDC, AWS SSO) to gain unauthorized cloud access. Riggs AI analyzes the federation event for golden SAML indicators, forged tokens, or unauthorized identity provider trust. Confirmed abuse triggers immediate trust revocation, comprehensive access audit of the abused federation session, credential access investigation, incident ticket creation, and emergency team notification.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of federation abuse findings and IAM identity provider management

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create critical incident tickets for identity federation abuse

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Emergency notification to security team of federation abuse

config.description: Triggers when anomalous identity federation activity is detected such as SAML assertions from unexpected IdPs, unusual role assumptions via federation, or token forgery indicators

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate federation abuse indicators: SAML assertion anomalies, unexpected issuer, role assumption patterns inconsistent with IdP configuration, golden SAML attack indicators
config.description: AI-powered analysis of identity federation activity to determine if tokens are forged, trust is compromised, or federation is being abused for unauthorized access
Routes based on whether the AI assessment confirmed identity federation abuse

parameters.reason: Identity federation abuse detected — revoking trust relationship

config.description: Immediately disable the compromised identity provider trust and revoke all active federated sessions

config.query: CloudTrail AssumeRoleWithSAML and AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity events for provider={{trigger_1.alert.provider_arn}} in last 72 hours: roles assumed, API calls made, resources accessed, source IPs
config.description: Audit all federated access sessions from the compromised provider to determine the full scope of unauthorized access

config.query: Analyze SAML assertions from provider={{trigger_1.alert.provider_arn}}: assertion validity periods, audience restrictions, signing certificate fingerprints, compare against known good IdP metadata
config.description: Investigate the federation tokens for signs of forgery such as mismatched signing certificates, unusual validity periods, or golden SAML indicators
Create a critical incident ticket documenting the federation abuse and all forensic findings
Send emergency notification to the security team about the federation abuse

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (credential_access template). Federation activity determined to be legitimate. IdP and SAML assertions are consistent with expected configuration. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that the federation activity was determined to be legitimate
